info.title: ConvertKit (Kit) API V3
info.description: ConvertKit (now Kit) API V3 for managing email marketing: subscribers, forms, sequences, tags, broadcasts, purchases, and webhooks.

apiKey.name: api_key
apiKey.description: ConvertKit API key. Some endpoints also require api_secret.

apiSecret.name: api_secret
apiSecret.description: ConvertKit API secret for privileged operations.
